reasoning: Outdoor tracking apps demand extreme visibility. In direct sunlight, dark mode reflects glare; a tactical light theme with 'bone-white' backgrounds reduces eye strain compared to pure white. Deep obsidian text and high-contrast alert colors (Red/Teal) ensure safety-critical data (like USGS flood levels) is instantly glanceable on the water. Large touch targets are critical for cold or wet hands.

layout.spacing_system: Generous internal padding (p-4 to p-6). Tight grid gaps (gap-3) for data dashboards. Every tap target MUST be at least 48px tall.
layout.container_max_width: max-w-md mx-auto sm:h-screen sm:overflow-hidden relative bg-white shadow-2xl sm:border sm:border-[#E0E1DD]
layout.grid_mode: MODE B: The Control Room Grid (for tracking dashboards)

surfaces.cards: bg-white border border-[#E0E1DD] rounded-2xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden
surfaces.floating_panel: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/95 border border-[#E0E1DD]/50 shadow-xl rounded-t-3xl
surfaces.bottom_nav: absolute bottom-0 w-full bg-white border-t border-[#E0E1DD] pb-safe pt-2 px-4 flex justify-between items-center z-50 h-20

buttons.primary: bg-[#0077B6] active:bg-[#03045E] text-white font-bold h-14 px-6 rounded-2xl transition-colors w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(0,119,182,0.39)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-[#0A1128] text-[#0A1128] font-bold h-14 px-6 rounded-2xl transition-colors w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.danger: bg-[#D62828] text-white font-bold h-14 px-6 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center

components.data_widget: flex flex-col p-4 bg-white border border-[#E0E1DD] rounded-2xl
components.pill_badge: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

images.description: Kayaker on whitewater river, use for featured intense river
Calm river POV, use for serene river featured section
Topographic map placeholder for map components

instructions_to_main_agent: MOBILE-FIRST APP SHELL: Treat this strictly as a mobile app interface. Wrap the entire app in `max-w-md mx-auto sm:h-screen sm:border` so it looks like a phone screen on desktop, and native full-screen on mobile devices. All heights should be constrained to `h-full` within this shell.
BOTTOM NAVIGATION: Implement a fixed bottom navigation bar inside the mobile shell container with 3-4 icons (e.g., Home, Track, Gauges).

GPS TRACKING VIEW: The map should take up the upper 50-60% of the screen. The lower half should be a 'bottom sheet' style floating panel (`rounded-t-3xl border-t shadow-xl`) housing the 'Control Room' grid with massive, highly legible tracking metrics (Speed, Distance).

USGS RIVER DATA VIEW: Treat CFS (Cubic Feet per Second) as critical data. Use `IBM Plex Sans` and `tabular-nums` for these numbers so they align perfectly. Bind the flow status to the exact colors defined: Teal for Safe, Orange for High, Red for Flood.

INTERACTIVITY: No soft drop shadows for buttons; rely on crisp borders, strong background colors, and scale down slightly on active states (`active:scale-[0.98]`). Touch targets MUST be at least 48px high.
FONTS: Install 'Manrope' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text via Google Fonts.
TESTING: Every single interactive element, form input, and key data point MUST have a `data-testid` attribute.
